allow: Bash(git diff HEAD -- src/lib/services/deployment.service.ts src/lib/services/vercel.service.ts src/app/api/publish/[id]/route.ts 2>&1 | head -80)

Bash(git add \\
  .gitignore CLAUDE.md package.json pnpm-lock.yaml \\
  src/ \\
  tests/ \\
  .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-04-SUMMARY.md \\
  .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-05-SUMMARY.md \\
  .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-06-SUMMARY.md \\
  .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-07-SUMMARY.md \\
  2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(01-03 to 01-07\): complete Phase 1 free-tier MVP

Waves 3-5 of the Phase 1 roadmap — all features verified and approved.

## Wave 3: Template registry + GitService \(01-03, 01-06\)
- InvitationFields Zod schema with 7 validated fields
- Template registry with 6 production-ready components \(3 minimal wedding,
  1 decorative wedding, 2 minimal baptism\) — date guard fix applied to all
- GitService: creates/updates invitation/{id} branches via Octokit REST API
- Tests: git-service \(3/3\), schema/registry \(12/12\)

## Wave 4: Dashboard, gallery, in-browser editor \(01-04, 01-05\)
- Dashboard with EmptyState + InvitationCard components
- Template gallery with FreeLimitBanner and preview modal
- Field-based editor: single FieldSidebar, live preview, autosave \(2s debounce\)
- PhotoUpload via Vercel Blob \(5MB limit, JPEG/PNG/WebP\)
- PublishButton + PublishProgress with SSE progress indicator
- Invitation CRUD API: GET/POST /api/invitations, GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/invitations/[id]
- Upload API: POST /api/upload
- Tests: invitations \(8/8\), autosave \(3/3\), upload \(4/4\)

## Wave 5: Vercel deploy pipeline \(01-07\)
- POST /api/publish/[id]: git write → project create/find → deploy trigger
  - Saves vercelProjectId before triggerDeploy so retries reuse same project
  - Injects env vars \(DATABASE_URL, Clerk, Blob\) into new Vercel projects
- GET /api/deploy-status/[deploymentId]: SSE stream, polls every 3s,
  updates DB on READY/ERROR, sends Resend email on success
- email.service.ts: sendPublishSuccessEmail via Resend \(graceful fallback\)
- triggerDeploy fix: correct project name + teamId query param for Vercel v13 API
- Tests: deployment \(6/6\) — pollStatus, triggerDeploy, SSE shape
- Total: 45/45 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/app/api/deploy-status/[deploymentId]/route.ts src/app/api/publish/[id]/route.ts src/lib/services/git.service.ts src/lib/services/vercel.service.ts tests/unit/git-service.test.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix\(01-07\): correct branch naming, file path, and Vercel project creation

- git.service: use invitation/{invitationId} branch \(was user/{userId}\)
- git.service: write to invitations/{id}/invitation-config.json \(was root\)
- publish route: pass invitationId to createOrUpdateProject \(not userId slug\)
- vercel.service: include teamId on project creation POST request
- vercel.service: treat 404 as success on deleteProject \(idempotent delete\)
- git-service.test: update fixtures and signatures to match new branch/path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-UAT.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test\(01\): complete UAT - 11 passed, 2 issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add src/app/api/deploy-status/[deploymentId]/route.ts .planning/phases/01-free-tier-mvp/01-UAT.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix\(deploy-status\): use stable Vercel alias instead of per-deployment URL

Re-publishing was showing a new URL each time because data.url on a
Vercel deployment object is the unique per-deployment subdomain \(changes
every publish\). Now reads data.alias[] and picks the stable production
alias \(invitation-{id}.vercel.app\) so liveUrl stays constant across
re-publishes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add .planning/milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md .planning/MILESTONES.md .planning/PROJECT.md .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/RETROSPECTIVE.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: archive v1.0 Free Tier MVP milestone

7 plans shipped across 1 phase. UAT: 11/13 passed, 1 bug fixed
\(stable re-publish URL\), 1 minor gap deferred \(i18n toggle\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git tag -a v1.0 -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
v1.0 Free Tier MVP

Delivered: Complete Free tier vertical slice — sign up, pick a template, customize in-browser, publish to a live Vercel URL in under 90 seconds with zero technical steps.

Key accomplishments:
- Next.js 16 + Clerk v7 auth scaffold with CI pipeline
- 6 production-ready invitation templates \(4 wedding, 2 baptism\)
- Field-based in-browser editor with live preview, photo upload, autosave
- Vercel deploy pipeline with SSE polling and stable URL on re-publish

See .planning/MILESTONES.md for full details.
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add .planning/phases/02-billing-infrastructure/02-CONTEXT.md && git commit -m "docs\(02\): capture phase 2 billing context")
Bash(git add .planning/STATE.md && git commit -m "docs\(state\): record phase 2 context session" 2>/dev/null || echo "nothing to commit")
Bash(git add .claude/ && git commit -m "docs\(session\): wrap up session 7 — phase 2 context complete")

hooks.command:
bash -c 'CONTEXT_DIR="/c/Work/WeddingGame/.claude"; OUTPUT=""; for f in context-snapshot.md nextsession.md decisions.md sessionlog.md; do FILE="$CONTEXT_DIR/$f"; if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then OUTPUT="$OUTPUT
--- $f ---
$(cat "$FILE")
"; fi; done; if [ -n "$OUTPUT" ]; then echo "[SESSION CONTEXT RESTORED]"; echo -e "$OUTPUT"; fi'
